description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:1.12.6 Docker image with a docker:1.12.6-dind service and caches the distfiles directory. Define a single stage named test. Add a verify job in the test stage that runs the commands: apk add --no-cache make, make docker-build, make check, and make verify. The job has no artifacts, caches only the distfiles path, and runs on every pipeline execution.
